subtitle: Absences block systems; KPI meeting tomorrow
context: Marie Cooksey is absent from 8-12 June (returning 13 June) and James Salas Guillen is on annual leave until 18 June - both absences block progress on DSE system updates and PeopleXD data uploads that Marie and James are overseeing. Julie Hickman's email from 9 June about case 68974493 (Chemistry bulk-delete CDR request) has waited 48+ hours without your response, and Sophie Levy from Cority contacted you on 8 June noting no contact for two months regarding the scoping session. The most time-critical deadline is the Team Meeting tomorrow (10 June) where each team must present KPIs and Statistics, organised by Simon Burford. Open first: Julie Hickman's RE message about case 68974493 and the Review Status Insight report for CDR bulk deletion, as Access Group needs two items from you before proceeding with the Chemistry project.
